**What should be added**

**Why it belongs in this repo**
How does it help a senior Java developer learn Python the way this repo teaches
(terse, Java-anchored, runnable)?

**Proposed outline**
- Module/exercise name and number
- 3-5 bullet points of what it would cover
- Java equivalent(s) it would anchor to

**Are you willing to PR it?**
(An outline issue first is required for new content — see CONTRIBUTING.md.)
